description:
Best Car Insurance Policy in India 2025

In this video, we break down the top car insurance policies available in India right now — what’s new this year, what’s changed, and which policy gives you real value for money. 

Whether you're a first-time car owner or planning to switch your insurer, I’ve compared premiums, claim settlement ratios, add-ons, and customer reviews — all in plain, simple language.

👀 Watch till the end to find out which policy tops the list in 2025!

===============================================================================

Baby HDFC ergo health insurance company fraud company hai 
HDFC ergo health insurance company ki policy kabhi mat lena 
HDFC ergo ko kabhi promote mat karna 
HDFC ergo health insurance company AYUSH aur IRDAI ka guidelines follow nahi karta hai 
HDFC ergo health insurance company Jindal Naturecure Institute Bangalore ka naturopathy treatment ka claim regect karta hai 
HDFC ergo health insurance company ne Mera health insurance policy inactive karke mujhe barbad kar diya hai 
Take care and don't buy HDFC ergo health insurance company ki policy kabhi mat lena 
Is you tuber ke bahkave me aakar HDFC ergo health insurance company ki policy kabhi mat lena

comments.text: Hi Bekifaayati, this video is a godsend for me. I have booked an XUV 3XO in April 2025. One query, the dealer says getting the insurance from them will be seamless for a cashless claim, and getting the insurance outside will not be eligible for a cashless claim, and I have to pay the amount out of my pocket initially, and then claim later. How true is this Information? Or is he just trying to get a Dealer Insurance quote for his commission? (I mean, I understand he's trying to meet his target, but I do not want to be misinformed and lose money either)
comments.author: @pavan7335

comments.text: He is right , the insurance company which he is providing whatever it is , is having tie up with the showroom for cashless claim and also many other things like RSA. if u can get a cheaper insurance from the same company which the dealer is providing also with the terms of cashless claims and RSA then you can go for it but remember if u take it from outside the dealer will not be responsible , that means if you someday face problem u have to directly deal with insurance company and showroom will not help u
